articles.title: 2026 NFL Free Agency Live Updates: Signings, Trades, Cuts
articles.summary: The 2026 NFL free agency period has begun, with several key signings and trades already taking place. The Baltimore Ravens have agreed to terms with edge rusher Trey Hendrickson, while quarterback Malik Willis is joining the Miami Dolphins and Tua Tagovailoa is signing with the Atlanta Falcons.
